title: Approved Change — ECR-218: Sonar transducer vendor change to AquaSound Corp
text:
Engineering Change Notice ECN-315. Implements ECR-218.
Approved by: Dr. Rhea Voss, 2024-09-12.

Authorised changes:
1. P-1148 (Sonar Transducer): Updated to Rev B, supplier changed from DepthWave Systems to AquaSound Corp. New specification: broadband 100–400kHz, depth-rated 30m, IP68 connector, DNV-GL certified.
2. P-1149 (Sonar Mounting Bracket): No change required. O-ring flange confirmed compatible with AquaSound interface at WIKI-045.
3. DOC-462 (Sonar System ICD): Updated for AquaSound Corp electrical and acoustic interface. Cass Doyle, completed 2024-10-15.
4. SRC-011 (sonar_driver.c): DSP filter anti-alias width narrowed for AquaSound tighter frequency stability. Cass Doyle, committed 2024-10-30.
5. DOC-468 (Sonar Performance Test Report): Re-issued with AquaSound qualification data. Aisha Mbeki, completed 2024-12-01.
6. DRW-517 (Sonar Transducer Mounting): Notes updated. Cass Doyle review (REV-641) captured 7° cant angle rationale.
